name: pre-mortem
one_liner: assume failure, work backward to causes

name: hanlons-razor
one_liner: don't attribute to malice what stupidity explains

name: chestertons-fence
one_liner: don't remove a rule until you know why it exists

name: parkinsons-law
one_liner: work expands to fill the time available

name: pigeonhole-principle
one_liner: more items than bins means at least one bin has ≥2

name: reverse-brainstorming
one_liner: worsen the problem to discover causes

name: random-stimulus
one_liner: force an unrelated input into the problem

name: fmea
one_liner: Failure Mode × Severity × Occurrence × Detection = RPN

name: fair
one_liner: risk as frequency × magnitude factor model

name: jobs-to-be-done
one_liner: what job does the customer "hire" the product for

name: dora-metrics
one_liner: deployment freq / lead time / MTTR / change failure rate

name: wsjf
one_liner: Cost of Delay ÷ Job Size prioritization

name: task-batching
one_liner: similar-task grouping to reduce context switching

name: underdetermination
one_liner: multiple theories fit the same data

name: ai-fairness-metrics
one_liner: demographic parity / equal opportunity / equalized odds
